news.headline: ECB's Kazaks: Projects higher market rates as reasonable scenario.

AI-related cryptocurrencies outperformed Bitcoin and Ethereum over a week with Fetch.ai (+8.24%), SingularityNET (+8.39%), and Ocean Protocol (+5.21%). This was influenced by AI giant NVIDIA Corp. becoming the world's most valuable company on June 18.
news.summary: AI-related cryptocurrencies saw significant gains this week, boosted by the success of AI giant NVIDIA Corp. (NASDAQ:NVDA). Fetch.ai (FET), SingularityNET (AGIX), and Ocean Protocol (OCEAN) experienced notable increases of 8.24%, 8.39%, and 5.21% respectively, outperforming Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH). Despite a downward trend earlier in the month, the market turned around on June 18 when Nvidia became the world's most valuable company. However, Nvidia's shares have since dropped by 6.6%. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Czech car manufacturers anticipate a record production this year, with estimated numbers reaching an all-time high.
Elder care market to hit $1.1 trillion by 2028 with CAGR of 5.8% from 2023-2028. Study forecasts steady growth.
news.summary: The market for elder care services and assistive devices is expected to experience steady growth in the upcoming years. According to a report by BCC Research, the compound annual growth rate (CAGR) for this market is projected to be 5.8% from 2023 to 2028. The report, titled "Elder Care Services and Assistive Devices: Global Markets," offers a comprehensive analysis of this sector. This forecast indicates promising opportunities for businesses operating in this market. The study highlights the increasing demand for elder care services and assistive devices on a global scale.

news.headline: BJ's Wholesale Club marks 40th anniversary by launching $1 million donation program to support local charities selected by employees.
news.summary: In honor of reaching its 40th year milestone, BJ’s Wholesale Club (NYSE: BJ) has introduced the Give 40 for 40 initiative. This program will allocate a sum of $1 million in grants to community charities. Employees of BJ’s, totaling 34,000 individuals, are encouraged to nominate organizations close to their hearts in categories such as hunger relief, education, and health and wellness. The BJ’s Charitable Foundation will then select and distribute the grants to the chosen charities, as part of the company’s anniversary celebration.

news.headline: Grand View Research introduces Horizon Databook with 350,000+ market stats and 12,000+ reports to revolutionize market intelligence.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in San Francisco, a renowned company, Grand View Research, Inc., introduced Horizon, an innovative technology data book. This groundbreaking resource is set to revolutionize market access and utilization for businesses, investors, and educational institutions. The launch marks a significant step forward in providing valuable insights and information with potentially far-reaching impacts.

news.headline: Caris welcomes Mass General Cancer Center to its Precision Oncology Alliance to enhance patient outcomes with precision medicine.
news.summary: Caris Life Sciences has broadened its network to include the prestigious Mass General Cancer Center, showcasing its dedication to enhancing patient outcomes through precision medicine advancements. The development was announced on June 27, 2024, in Irving, Texas. Caris, a pioneer in the field, aims to collaborate with prominent cancer institutions and has now increased its network to encompass an even greater number of leading organizations.

news.headline: CGI chosen as FBI tech partner to advance modernization efforts, stock symbols GIB.A (TSX) GIB (NYSE), June 27, 2024.
news.summary: Technology company CGI Federal Inc. has been chosen as a partner for the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI). The announcement was made on June 27, 2024, by CGI, a subsidiary of CGI Inc. The stock market symbols for CGI Inc. are GIB.A on TSX and GIB on NYSE. No specific financial numbers were provided.

news.headline: KalVista starts KONFIDENT-KID trial for on-demand HAE treatment in kids 2-11 with sebetralstat. 24 children across 7 countries in North America, Europe, and Asia to participate in the trial.
news.summary: In CAMBRIDGE, Mass. & SALISBURY, England, KalVista Pharmaceuticals, Inc. disclosed the launch of the open-label KONFIDENT-KID clinical trial for sebetralstat, an oral plasma kallikrein inhibitor, aimed at pediatric patients with hereditary angioedema (HAE). The study is set to include around 24 children aged between 2 to 11 years old from seven nations in North America, Europe, and Asia. The KONFIDENT-KID trial will focus on gathering safety, pharmacokinetic, and efficacy information for ea.

news.headline: McCormick reports Q2 performance, reaffirms 2024 outlook, and announces investor day. Sales declined 1% in Q2.
news.summary: In Hunt Valley, Maryland, on June 27, 2024, McCormick & Company, Incorporated (NYSE: MKC), a prominent player in the flavor industry, disclosed their financial performance for the quarter concluding on May 31, 2024. Despite experiencing a 1% drop in sales compared to the same period last year, the company reiterated its fiscal 2024 outlook.

news.headline: Oculis and EURETINA partner to create the Ramin Tadayoni Award in 2024. #innovation #ophthalmology
news.summary: Oculis Holding AG, a global biopharmaceutical company (Nasdaq: OCS; XICE: OCS) based in ZUG, Switzerland, has revealed the creation of the Ramin Tadayoni Award in partnership with EURETINA on June 27, 2024. The award is part of Oculis' mission to safeguard vision and enhance eye healthcare.

news.headline: Hut 8 Corp. to join Russell 3000 Index on July 1, 2024. Leading Bitcoin miner and energy infrastructure operator.
news.summary: Hut 8 Corp., a prominent Bitcoin miner and energy infrastructure operator in North America, will be included in the Russell 3000® Index starting July 1st, 2024. The company's stock trades on Nasdaq and TSX under the ticker symbol HUT. This inclusion in the index follows the annual reconstitution of the 2024 Russell U.S. Indexes. The announcement was made on June 21st, 2024, with the effective date being the open of U.S. equity markets on Monday, July 1st, 2024.

news.headline: Stallion Uranium identifies 5 conductive trends as key target areas on Sandy Lake Project, moving closer to drill readiness.
news.summary: The latest survey conducted at Sandy Lake has identified significant target areas, bringing the project closer to being ready for drilling. This development marks a crucial advancement in the project, highlighting the potential for exploration and potential future milestones.

news.headline: X4 Pharmaceuticals reports 100% of CN trial participants achieved ANC target increase at Month 6 with mavorixafor.
news.summary: By the Month 6 evaluation, all eligible participants had successfully reached the desired increase in target absolute neutrophil count (ANC) using once-daily oral mavorixafor with or without a consistent dosage of G-CSF, according to data from the interim analysis.

news.headline: Elanco's Zenrelia nearing FDA approval in Q3 2024; Credelio Quattro in Q4. Zenrelia already approved in Brazil.
news.summary: Key technical components for Zenrelia have been finalized, positioning the drug for FDA approval by late third quarter 2024. Meanwhile, the expected final approval for Credelio Quattro by the FDA has been shifted to the fourth quarter of 2024. Brazil granted its first approval for Zenrelia in 2024, marking a significant milestone for the product. These developments mark important progress in the regulatory processes for both medications.

news.headline: Medigene presents efficient 6-day TCR-T therapy production process at summit in Beijing for lead candidate MDG1015.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Planegg/Martinsried, Medigene AG, a company listed on the FSE as MDG1, specializing in immuno-oncology, shared detailed insights on its lead candidate MDG1015 at the 7th Cell and Gene Therapy In-Depth Focus Summit in Beijing, China. MDG1015 is a pioneering 3rd generation T cell receptor engineered T cell therapy that targets cancer-testis antigens NY-ESO-1 / LAGE-1a. This therapy is fortified with the Company’s PD1-41BB costimulatory switch protein and is progressing towards clinical trials.

news.headline: TMC chooses Trimble Instinct & Video Intelligence for safety & efficiency. Improving fleet operations with solutions.
news.summary: Today, Trimble revealed that TMC, headquartered in Des Moines, Iowa, has chosen Trimble's Instinct and Video Intelligence fleet management solutions to enhance safety, compliance, and operational efficiency. The company's Instinct and Video Intelligence systems will be utilized by TMC to optimize its fleet operations.

news.headline: Explore new battle in Dragon Strike: Puzzle RPG - blend of match-3 and RPG mechanics. Play now on Play Store and App Store.
news.summary: Immerse yourself in Dragon Strike: Puzzle RPG, where the exciting blend of match-3 and RPG elements awaits. The game can be accessed on both the Play Store and App Store. Explore this unique gameplay today.

news.headline: Firm with real-world assets plans to launch cryptocurrency and go public this year.
news.summary: The transparently-audited corporation is planning to introduce its own cryptocurrency supported by its collection of real estate properties and ownership interests.

news.headline: Bitcoin wallet from Satoshi era reactivates after 14 years, sends 50 BTC to Binance; mined in July 2010 when BTC was $0.05
news.summary: In July 2010, a Bitcoin miner received 50 BTC as mining rewards when the price of BTC was $0.05. The wallet still belongs to the same miner.

news.headline: Binance tightens account security, urges reporting misuse for reward.
news.summary: Users are urged to report any instances of misuse on the platform and stand a chance to receive a reward for confirmed cases.

news.headline: Coinbase skips ASI token migration amid ongoing $7.5B merger, users can transfer AI tokens via self-custodial wallets.
news.summary: Despite the decision made by Coinbase, users still have the option to transfer their AI tokens to self-custodial wallets in order to participate in the merger worth $7.5 billion.

news.headline: Developers of Telegram mini-apps can now earn Toncoin with Adsgram to monetize their creations.
news.summary: The Adsgram platform, supported by the TON Foundation, provides a unique approach compared to other Telegram advertising tools. It enables developers to earn revenue through ads within mini-apps.

news.headline: BoE's Hauser anticipates a slew of data before the next policy meeting. #BankofEngland #Data #PolicyMeeting
BoE's Hauser highlights importance of not basing policy solely on one number, signaling intention to avoid such error.
Sarcina Technology CEO predicts bump pitch transformers to revolutionize advanced packaging market.
news.summary: Dr. Larry Zu, Founder and CEO of Sarcina Technology, a leader in Application Specific Advanced Packaging (ASAP) Design Service and Production, announced a more efficient and affordable approach to the 2.5D packaging landscape. The new method is expected to significantly impact the industry.

news.headline: Clarivate report showcases impact of digital health research growth. Global Research Report by ISI reveals data from multiple sources.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in London, Clarivate Plc (NYSE: CLVT), a prominent provider of transformative intelligence, unveiled a Global Research Report by the Institute for Scientific Information (ISI). This report consolidates and analyzes data from various sources worldwide.

news.headline: RamSoft and RADPAIR have integrated AI-driven radiology report generation into OmegaAI's platform, saving radiologists time and accelerating clinical output. This collaboration aims to automate patient-specific reports.
news.summary: In recent news, radiologists are able to increase efficiency and productivity by utilizing automated tools to generate patient-specific reports in Toronto and Knoxville. This advancement, announced on June 27, 2024, is a collaboration between RamSoft® and RADPAIR. RamSoft® is known for their cloud-based RIS/PACS radiology solutions, while RADPAIR specializes in enhancing clinical workflows. This innovation is expected to save radiologists a significant amount of time and expedite their clinical output.

news.headline: EquiFi appoints Paul Giangrande as Corporate EVP and President of EquiFi Mortgage Division. Giangrande oversaw 300+ employees closing more than $18 billion in home loans as former President of AmeriCash Mortgage.
news.summary: Paul has been appointed by EquiFi Corporation as the former President of AmeriCash Mortgage, where he oversaw a team of over 300 employees who closed more than $18 billion in home loans. The announcement was made in San Jose, California on June 27, 2024. EquiFi Corporation is known for offering shared equity home financing solutions.

news.headline: H World Group Limited's 2024 AGM voting results include passing resolutions on June 27, 2024. ($, %, AGM meeting)
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, H World Group Limited (NASDAQ: HTHT and HKEX: 1179), a significant player in the global hotel industry, conducted its 2024 annual general meeting. At the AGM, key resolutions were successfully approved.

news.headline: Sydbank A/S successfully acquires Coop Bank A/S following agreed terms.
RWS debuts Trados Studio 2024, a top CAT tool with AI features, after 40 years of innovation. AI enhances accessibility.
news.summary: In Chalfont St Peter, England, RWS, a prominent provider of technology-enabled language solutions, has unveiled the release of Trados Studio 2024. This latest iteration of the renowned computer-assisted translation (CAT) tool, which follows forty years of innovation, caters to the varied and growing requirements of users. Trados Studio 2024 introduces advanced AI features and improved accessibility, enhancing the user experience.

news.headline: Fundstrat's Tom Lee predicts S&P 500 to reach 15,000 by 2030 driven by Gen Z and AI wave, expecting high compound returns.
news.summary: Tom Lee, the managing partner and head of research at Fundstrat Global Advisors, is optimistic about the S&P 500's future performance. He predicts that the index will reach 15,000 by 2030, attributing this potential growth to the increasing influence of artificial intelligence. Lee suggests that a new stock market cycle is underway, with annual returns expected to grow significantly. This trend is largely fueled by younger generations such as millennials and Gen Z. Lee highlighted in an interview with CNBC’s Last Call that this would mark the third instance of stocks experiencing a cycle with high annual return compounding.

news.headline: Connect Creative in New York appoints Parke Chapman as VP, boosting Eastern region with 25 years of exp.
news.summary: A creative services agency focused on commercial real estate, Connect Creative, has appointed Parke Chapman as Vice President of its Eastern region in New York. Chapman brings 25 years of communications and reporting expertise to the team, signifying a momentous step in the company's expansion. This move underscores the company's commitment to growth and enhancing its presence in the market.

news.headline: BoE's Hauser: Labor market showing strong performance.
Hauser of BoE indicates delay in policy effectiveness due to time.
BoE's Hauser noted a slight increase in yesterday's CPI figure.
BoE official says future is still unclear, no change in forecast.
ReconAfrica provides operations update on Petroleum Exploration Licence 73 in northeast with TSXV: RECO and OTCQX: RECAF.
news.summary: In Calgary, AB on June 27, 2024, Reconnaissance Energy Africa Ltd. shared an operational update regarding their work on Petroleum Exploration Licence 73 ("PEL 73") in northeast onshore areas. The Company, also known as ReconAfrica, revealed this news. ReconAfrica is listed on the TSX Venture Exchange as RECO, on the OTCQX as RECAF, and on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange as 0XD.

news.headline: DZYNE Technologies acquires High Point Aerotechnologies, enhancing defense capabilities with counter-UAS tech.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Irvine, California, a significant transaction took place where DZYNE Technologies, a renowned developer and producer of autonomous technologies such as Group I-V UAS, added strong counter-UAS capabilities to their portfolio. This strategic move boosts their position as a top player in autonomous flight innovation globally.

news.headline: Cordoniq wins 2024 Globee American Business Awards & Globee Technology Awards with a total of nine awards this year.
news.summary: A company called Cordoniq, known for its secure video collaboration platform, has recently achieved significant recognition in awards competitions. In the 2024 Globee Technology Awards, Cordoniq secured the gold title for Video Solutions and Video Conferencing. Additionally, in the 2024 Globee American Business Awards, it received a silver award for Digital Collaboration Achievement. These victories mark Cordoniq's ninth award in the current year and its total count surpassing 10 honors over the past 12 months. Notably, out of 136 companies recognized in the Globee Technology Awards, only around a third were granted distinctions.

news.headline: Carnegie Corporation of New York honors 24 naturalized citizens for their contributions to American democracy, part of annual Great Immigrants campaign.
news.summary: Carnegie Corporation of New York recently revealed its annual selection of Great Immigrants, recognizing 24 naturalized citizens for their impactful contributions to society and democracy. This initiative, known as Great Immigrants, Great Americans, has been running every Fourth of July since 2006 to highlight the essential role of immigrants in the United States. The 2024 cohort comprises naturalized citizens from 16 different backgrounds.

news.headline: Galvanize Real Estate acquires 245,000 sq. ft. industrial asset in New York at One Gateway Boulevard.
news.summary: Galvanize Real Estate, known as GRE, shared the news that they have acquired a sizable industrial property spanning over 245,000 square feet situated at One Gateway Boulevard in New York City.

news.headline: Record-high property tax increases of 19.9% reported in south suburbs, impacting many homeowners. Source: Cook County Treasurer Maria Pappas.
news.summary: In recent news, it has been reported that homeowners residing in various south and southwest suburbs are facing a significant increase in property taxes. According to a recent analysis by Cook County Treasurer Maria Pappas, the median tax bill in the region has surged by a record 19.9%. This sudden spike in property taxes will undoubtedly impact many residents in these areas, highlighting the financial strain that homeowners are now facing.

news.headline: CureLab Oncology files patent for p62-based wound-healing therapy to accelerate healing and reduce complications.
news.summary: A cutting-edge wound-healing therapy utilizing p62/SQSTM1 developed by clinical-stage biotech company CureLab Oncology has shown promising results in accelerating wound healing and decreasing complications. The company has recently applied for a patent with global reach for this innovative treatment. The therapy has the potential to significantly enhance the healing process and reduce complications associated with wounds. The application was filed on June 27, 2024, in Boston.

news.headline: Primer Technologies appoints Erin Hawley as CRO & Joe Chang as CTO to bolster executive team on June 27, 2024.
news.summary: Primer Technologies, an AI/ML technology company based in Arlington, Virginia, revealed the appointment of Erin Hawley as Chief Revenue Officer (CRO) and Joe Chang as Chief Technology Officer (CTO) on June 27, 2024. The firm is known for its expertise in creating and implementing AI solutions. This move is aimed at enhancing the company's leadership team to drive growth and innovation. Hawley will oversee revenue strategies, while Chang will lead technology operations. The additions signify Primer Technologies' commitment to advancing its capabilities and expanding its market presence.

news.headline: Strive unveils new ETF (NYSE: STXI) tracking International Developed Markets, by $1.5B asset manager focused on capitalism.
news.summary: In Columbus, Ohio on June 27, 2024, Strive Asset Management introduced its newest fund, the Strive International Developed Markets ETF (NYSE: STXI). With assets totaling $1.5 billion, Strive aims to embrace unyielding capitalism through this latest addition to its portfolio. The STXI fund is designed to track...

news.headline: Li Industries secures $42M in Series B funding, adds $6M from new investors General Motors  Ventures, DNX Ventures, and Tech Energy Ventures.
news.summary: In Pineville, North Carolina on June 27, 2024, Li Industries has confirmed the completion of its Series B funding round with an extra $6 million pledged by investors. Among the new investors are General Motors (GM) Ventures, DNX Ventures, and Tech Energy Ventures. This recent influx of funds will aid in advancing the company's initiatives.

news.headline: Historian Elizabeth Varon wins $50,000 for Longstreet biography, highlighting historic battlefields' importance.
news.summary: A book titled "Longstreet: The Confederate General Who Defied the South" has been awarded the prestigious $50,000 American Battlefield Trust Prize for its exceptional storytelling that highlights the importance of historic battlefields as crucial sources of literature. The prize was announced in Washington on June 27, 2024.

news.headline: Markel appoints Jennifer Gebran as Head of Casualty for MENA region. Effective immediately.
news.summary: Dubai, UAE - On June 27, 2024, Markel, the insurance division of Markel Group Inc. (NYSE: MKL), revealed that Jennifer Gebran has been appointed as the Head of Casualty for the Middle East and North Africa (MENA) region. This appointment is effective immediately.
